problems.cause: Syntax error due to missing closing parentheses in assume clause on line 101, causing parser to misinterpret 'var' as part of the incomplete expression
problems.minimal_edit: Close the logical expression in assume clause by adding parentheses around each port validation: (inpGCASM = true or inpGCASM = false) and (inpSAM = true or inpSAM = false) and (inpACASM = true or inpACASM = false) and (inpGFM = true or inpGFM = false) and (inpWxM = true or inpWxM = false) and (inpFLS = true or inpFLS = false)

executor_steps: Locate the assume clause starting at line 101
Add parentheses around each boolean port validation subexpression to enforce correct operator precedence
Ensure the entire assume clause is a well-formed conjunction of parenthesized disjunctions
Verify that the corrected assume clause ends before line 105 where 'var' is declared
